## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

### Project Gutenberg: A Free Digital Library of Over 75,000 eBooks

* **Massive Collection**: Library contains over 75,000 free eBooks available in epub and Kindle formats for download or online reading
* **Focus on Classic Literature**: Specializes in world's great literature, primarily older works with expired U.S. copyright
* **Completely Free Access**: 100% free with no fees, registration requirements, or apps needed—only standard web browsers or eBook readers
* **Long-Standing Pioneer**: Operating since 1971, making it a 50+ year pioneer in free digital literature
* **Volunteer-Driven**: Hundreds of volunteers have digitized and proofread eBooks over the years
* **Ways to Contribute**: Users can help through Distributed Proofreaders (main source of new eBooks), report errors and typos, or record audiobooks with LibriVox
* **Audiobook Availability**: Offers audio versions of texts through partner organizations, all public domain in the US
* **Leadership Note**: Features tribute to late CEO Dr. Greg Newby

### 古腾堡计划:超过75,000本免费电子书的数字图书馆

* **海量藏书**:图书馆包含超过75,000本免费电子书,提供epub和Kindle格式,可下载或在线阅读
* **聚焦经典文学**:专注于世界伟大文学作品,主要是美国版权已过期的经典著作
* **完全免费访问**:100%免费,无需付费、注册或下载应用程序——只需标准网页浏览器或电子书阅读器
* **历史悠久的先驱**:自1971年起运营,是拥有50多年历史的免费数字文学先驱
* **志愿者驱动**:多年来数百名志愿者参与数字化和校对电子书工作
* **参与贡献方式**:用户可通过分布式校对网站(新电子书的主要来源)帮助校对、报告错误和拼写错误,或与LibriVox合作录制有声书
* **有声书资源**:通过合作组织提供文本的音频版本,在美国均为公共领域
* **领导层致敬**:纪念已故首席执行官Greg Newby博士

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.gutenberg.org/)**

### A 0-Click Exploit Chain for the Pixel 10: When a Door Closes, a Window Opens

* **Successful exploit chain ported from Pixel 9 to Pixel 10** - Project Zero demonstrated a zero-click to root attack using two exploits, updating the Dolby UDC vulnerability (CVE-2025-54957) with offset adjustments and adapting to RET PAC protection
* **New VPU driver vulnerability discovered** - The Pixel 10's replacement of BigWave with a VPU driver for the Chips&Media Wave677DV chip exposed a critical mmap handler flaw allowing unrestricted physical memory mapping
* **Exceptionally simple kernel exploit** - The VPU bug enabled arbitrary kernel read-write with just 5 lines of code, allowing direct access to kernel memory at known physical addresses without KASLR bypass needed
* **Improved patch timeline but persistent security concerns** - Android patched the VPU vulnerability in 71 days (within 90-day disclosure window), showing progress in triage, but the shallow nature of the bug highlights ongoing need for proactive driver security auditing
* **Call for systemic improvements** - Despite faster patching, the discovery of obvious vulnerabilities in drivers from the same development team 5 months after BigWave issues underscores the need for better secure development practices before products reach end-users

---

### Pixel 10 的 0-Click 漏洞利用链：当一扇门关闭时，一扇窗打开

* **成功将 Pixel 9 漏洞利用链移植到 Pixel 10** - Project Zero 展示了使用两个漏洞实现从零点击到 root 权限的攻击，更新了 Dolby UDC 漏洞（CVE-2025-54957）的偏移量并适配了 RET PAC 保护机制
* **发现新的 VPU 驱动漏洞** - Pixel 10 用 VPU 驱动替代 BigWave 以支持 Chips&Media Wave677DV 芯片，但暴露了一个严重的 mmap 处理程序缺陷，允许无限制映射物理内存
* **极其简单的内核漏洞利用** - VPU 漏洞仅需 5 行代码即可实现任意内核读写，可在已知物理地址直接访问内核内存，甚至无需绕过 KASLR
* **补丁时间改善但安全隐患持续存在** - Android 在 71 天内修复了 VPU 漏洞（90 天披露窗口内），显示分类流程进步，但漏洞的浅显性质凸显了主动驱动安全审计的持续需求
* **呼吁系统性改进** - 尽管补丁速度加快，但在 BigWave 问题 5 个月后，同一开发团队的驱动中仍发现明显漏洞，强调了在产品交付用户前需要更好的安全开发实践

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://projectzero.google/2026/05/pixel-10-exploit.html)**

### claude-sonnet-4-5 Wants Access to Your Bank Account: Key Points

* **New Financial Integration**: OpenAI announced ChatGPT can now connect to bank accounts via Plaid, accessing balances, transaction history, subscriptions, investments, and debts across 12,000+ institutions
* **Features Offered**: Users get spending dashboards, personalized financial advice, and alerts for unusual spending patterns in exchange for sharing comprehensive financial data
* **Limited Rollout**: Currently available only to Pro subscribers ($200/month), with plans to expand to Plus users and eventually all users
* **Privacy Concerns**: While ChatGPT cannot modify accounts or see full account numbers, it accesses all other financial data; disconnection takes up to 30 days for data deletion
* **Training Data Opt-In**: Users can opt out of having financial data used for model training, but the default setting and framing ("Improve the model for everyone") may obscure the significance of this choice
* **Pattern Recognition**: This follows January's ChatGPT Health launch with medical records, raising similar unanswered questions about data protection, breach protocols, and long-term data usage
* **Commercial Implications**: OpenAI's need for profitability raises concerns about what happens to this valuable financial dataset during business model shifts, acquisitions, or restructuring

### ChatGPT 想要访问你的银行账户：要点总结

* **新金融整合功能**：OpenAI 宣布 ChatGPT 现可通过 Plaid 连接银行账户，访问 12,000 多家机构的余额、交易历史、订阅、投资和债务信息
* **提供的功能**：用户分享全面的财务数据后，可获得支出仪表板、个性化理财建议和异常消费模式预警
* **有限推出**：目前仅向 Pro 订阅用户（每月 200 美元）开放，计划扩展至 Plus 用户并最终面向所有用户
* **隐私担忧**：虽然 ChatGPT 无法修改账户或查看完整账号，但可访问所有其他财务数据；断开连接后数据删除需要长达 30 天
* **训练数据选择加入**：用户可选择不将财务数据用于模型训练，但默认设置和措辞（"为所有人改进模型"）可能掩盖了这一选择的重要性
* **模式识别**：这延续了 1 月份推出的 ChatGPT Health 医疗记录功能，引发了关于数据保护、泄露协议和长期数据使用的类似未解答问题
* **商业影响**：OpenAI 的盈利需求引发了对这一宝贵财务数据集在商业模式转变、收购或重组期间会如何处理的担忧

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://firethering.com/chatgpt-bank-account-plaid-openai/)**


## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### OpenHuman - Your Private AI Super Intelligence with 118+ Integrations

* **What it does**: OpenHuman is an open-source agentic AI assistant that integrates deeply into your daily workflow through 118+ third-party services (Gmail, Notion, GitHub, Slack, Calendar, etc.). It builds a comprehensive knowledge base from your connected accounts and maintains persistent memory across sessions, becoming context-aware in minutes rather than weeks.

* **Key features**: 
  - **Memory Tree + Obsidian Wiki**: Automatically fetches and compresses data from all connected services every 20 minutes into a local SQLite database and Markdown files you can browse and edit
  - **Desktop mascot with personality**: An animated character that speaks, reacts, joins Google Meets as a real participant, and thinks in the background
  - **One-click OAuth integrations**: Connect to 118+ services instantly without manual API key management
  - **TokenJuice compression**: Reduces token usage by up to 80% through intelligent compression of tool outputs, HTML-to-Markdown conversion, and payload optimization
  - **Batteries included**: Web search, scraping, full coding toolset (filesystem, git, lint, test), native voice (STT/TTS with lip-sync), and model routing built-in
  - **Privacy-first**: All data stays local, encrypted on your device, with optional self-hosted agentmemory backend support

* **Why it's notable**: Unlike other AI assistants that require weeks of training or manual context-building, OpenHuman achieves full context awareness in minutes through automated data syncing. It's the first agent harness inspired by Karpathy's LLM knowledge base approach, combining the simplicity of consumer apps with the power of developer tools. With 1,272 stars today, it's gaining traction as a privacy-focused alternative to proprietary solutions like Claude Cowork, offering a complete AI infrastructure under one subscription without API key sprawl.

---

### OpenHuman - 私密且极其强大的个人 AI 超级智能

* **功能介绍**: OpenHuman 是一个开源的智能 AI 助手,通过 118+ 个第三方服务(Gmail、Notion、GitHub、Slack、日历等)深度集成到你的日常工作流程中。它从你连接的账户中构建全面的知识库,并在会话之间保持持久记忆,在几分钟内(而非数周)就能获得完整上下文。

* **主要特点**:
  - **记忆树 + Obsidian 知识库**: 每 20 分钟自动从所有连接的服务获取并压缩数据到本地 SQLite 数据库和可浏览编辑的 Markdown 文件
  - **桌面吉祥物**: 会说话、有反应、能作为真实参与者加入 Google Meet 会议、在后台持续思考的动画角色
  - **一键 OAuth 集成**: 无需手动管理 API 密钥,即可立即连接 118+ 个服务
  - **TokenJuice 压缩技术**: 通过智能压缩工具输出、HTML 转 Markdown 和负载优化,将 token 使用量减少高达 80%
  - **开箱即用**: 内置网页搜索、抓取、完整编码工具集(文件系统、git、lint、测试)、原生语音(STT/TTS 带唇形同步)和模型路由
  - **隐私优先**: 所有数据保存在本地,在你的设备上加密,支持可选的自托管 agentmemory 后端

* **为何值得关注**: 与其他需要数周训练或手动构建上下文的 AI 助手不同,OpenHuman 通过自动数据同步在几分钟内就能实现完整的上下文感知。这是首个受 Karpathy 的 LLM 知识库方法启发的智能体框架,将消费级应用的简洁性与开发者工具的强大功能相结合。今日获得 1,272 星标,作为 Claude Cowork 等专有解决方案的隐私友好替代品正在获得关注,在一个订阅下提供完整的 AI 基础设施,无需管理多个 API 密钥。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman)**

### Superpowers - An Agentic Skills Framework for AI-Powered Software Development

* **What it does**: A complete software development methodology that transforms coding agents (like Claude, Cursor, Copilot) into systematic developers. Instead of jumping straight into code, agents follow a structured workflow: brainstorming → design approval → implementation planning → subagent-driven development → test-driven implementation → code review → branch completion.

* **Key features**: 
  - **Automatic skill activation** - agents detect context and apply appropriate workflows without manual prompting
  - **Subagent-driven development** - spawns fresh subagents for each task with two-stage review (spec compliance, then code quality)
  - **True TDD enforcement** - RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle that deletes code written before tests
  - **Git worktree integration** - isolated workspaces for parallel development
  - **Composable skills library** - testing, debugging, collaboration, and meta skills that work together
  - **Multi-agent support** - works across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Codex, and more

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses the core problem of AI coding agents: they rush to implementation without understanding requirements. Superpowers enforces a disciplined methodology that produces better designs, cleaner code, and autonomous multi-hour work sessions. With 1,646 stars today, it's gaining rapid traction as developers discover they can finally trust agents to work independently while following engineering best practices. Built by Jesse Vincent and Prime Radiant, it's MIT licensed and available through official plugin marketplaces.

---

### Superpowers - AI 编程代理的技能框架与软件开发方法论

* **功能介绍**: 一套完整的软件开发方法论,将编程代理(如 Claude、Cursor、Copilot)转变为系统化的开发者。代理不会直接跳入编码,而是遵循结构化工作流:头脑风暴 → 设计确认 → 实施计划 → 子代理驱动开发 → 测试驱动实现 → 代码审查 → 分支完成。

* **主要特点**:
  - **自动技能激活** - 代理检测上下文并自动应用相应工作流,无需手动提示
  - **子代理驱动开发** - 为每个任务生成新的子代理,进行两阶段审查(规范合规性,然后代码质量)
  - **真正的 TDD 强制执行** - 红-绿-重构循环,删除在测试之前编写的代码
  - **Git worktree 集成** - 为并行开发提供隔离工作空间
  - **可组合技能库** - 测试、调试、协作和元技能协同工作
  - **多代理支持** - 支持 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot CLI、Codex 等多个平台

* **为何值得关注**: 解决了 AI 编程代理的核心问题:在理解需求之前就急于实现。Superpowers 强制执行规范化方法论,产出更好的设计、更清晰的代码,并支持数小时的自主工作。今日获得 1,646 星标,开发者发现他们终于可以信任代理独立工作并遵循工程最佳实践。由 Jesse Vincent 和 Prime Radiant 构建,采用 MIT 许可证,可通过官方插件市场获取。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)**

### Scientific Agent Skills - Comprehensive AI Research Assistant Toolkit

* **What it does**: A collection of 135 ready-to-use skills that transform AI coding agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) into powerful research assistants. Provides curated access to 100+ scientific databases, 70+ optimized Python packages, and specialized tools for executing complex multi-step scientific workflows across biology, chemistry, medicine, physics, and more.

* **Key features**: 
  - Unified access to 78+ public databases (PubChem, ChEMBL, UniProt, COSMIC, ClinicalTrials.gov) plus specialized data sources
  - Pre-documented skills for scientific Python packages (RDKit, Scanpy, PyTorch Lightning, BioPython, OpenMM, scVelo)
  - Covers 17+ scientific domains: genomics, drug discovery, proteomics, clinical research, medical imaging, materials science, geospatial analysis
  - Includes research communication tools (literature review, scientific writing, grant writing)
  - Works with any AI agent supporting the open Agent Skills standard
  - Simple installation via `npx skills add` command

* **Why it's notable**: Bridges the gap between AI coding agents and specialized scientific computing by providing production-ready, tested code examples and comprehensive documentation. Saves researchers days of API integration work and enables complex scientific analyses through natural language prompts. The 643 stars today reflect strong demand for accessible AI-powered research tools, especially as the project recently expanded beyond Claude to support any compatible AI agent.

---

### Scientific Agent Skills - 综合 AI 科研助手工具包

* **功能介绍**: 包含 135 个即用型技能的集合,可将 AI 编码助手(Cursor、Claude Code、Codex)转变为强大的科研助手。提供对 100+ 科学数据库、70+ 优化 Python 包的精选访问,以及跨生物学、化学、医学、物理等领域执行复杂多步骤科学工作流的专业工具。

* **主要特点**:
  - 统一访问 78+ 公共数据库(PubChem、ChEMBL、UniProt、COSMIC、ClinicalTrials.gov)及专业数据源
  - 为科学 Python 包预先编写文档的技能(RDKit、Scanpy、PyTorch Lightning、BioPython、OpenMM、scVelo)
  - 覆盖 17+ 科学领域:基因组学、药物发现、蛋白质组学、临床研究、医学影像、材料科学、地理空间分析
  - 包含科研交流工具(文献综述、科学写作、基金申请)
  - 兼容任何支持开放 Agent Skills 标准的 AI 助手
  - 通过 `npx skills add` 命令简单安装

* **为何值得关注**: 通过提供生产就绪、经过测试的代码示例和全面文档,在 AI 编码助手与专业科学计算之间架起桥梁。为研究人员节省数天的 API 集成工作,并能通过自然语言提示实现复杂科学分析。今日获得 643 星标反映了对易用 AI 驱动科研工具的强烈需求,特别是该项目最近从仅支持 Claude 扩展到支持任何兼容的 AI 助手。

## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### OrcaSlicer-bambulab - Restored BambuNetwork Support for Bambu Lab 3D Printers

* **What it does**: A modified version of OrcaSlicer that restores full BambuNetwork connectivity for Bambu Lab 3D printers, enabling remote printing over the internet instead of being limited to LAN-only mode.

* **Key features**: 
  - Full BambuNetwork support restored for internet-based printer control
  - Works with all normal printing functionality
  - Cross-platform support (Windows with WSL 2, native Linux, macOS in progress)
  - Compatible with BMCU firmware from the same developer

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses a significant limitation in the official OrcaSlicer by re-enabling cloud connectivity for Bambu Lab printers, allowing users to control and monitor their 3D printers remotely from anywhere with internet access. With 4,553 stars, it's gained traction among users seeking the convenience of remote printing capabilities that were previously restricted.

---

### OrcaSlicer-bambulab - 恢复 Bambu Lab 打印机完整网络支持

* **功能介绍**: OrcaSlicer 的修改版本,为 Bambu Lab 3D 打印机恢复了完整的 BambuNetwork 连接功能,支持通过互联网远程打印,不再局限于局域网模式。

* **主要特点**:
  - 恢复完整的 BambuNetwork 支持,可通过互联网控制打印机
  - 支持所有常规打印功能
  - 跨平台支持(Windows 需 WSL 2、原生 Linux、macOS 开发中)
  - 兼容同一开发者的 BMCU 固件

* **为何值得关注**: 解决了官方 OrcaSlicer 的重要限制,重新启用了 Bambu Lab 打印机的云连接功能,让用户可以在任何有互联网的地方远程控制和监控 3D 打印机。该项目获得 4,553 星标,在寻求远程打印便利性的用户中广受欢迎。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/FULU-Foundation/OrcaSlicer-bambulab)**

### YellowKey - BitLocker Bypass Vulnerability Discovery

* **What it does**: Demonstrates a critical vulnerability that allows bypassing Windows BitLocker disk encryption protection through Windows Recovery Environment manipulation
* **Key features**: 
  - Requires only a USB stick with specific FsTx folder structure
  - Works by exploiting Windows Recovery Environment (WinRE) components
  - Grants unrestricted access to BitLocker-protected volumes without knowing the encryption key
  - Affects Windows 11, Server 2022, and Server 2025 (Windows 10 not affected)
* **Why it's notable**: The researcher suggests this could be an intentional backdoor due to suspicious component behavior - the vulnerable component exists only in WinRE with unique functionality not found in standard Windows installations. The simplicity and convenience of the exploit raises serious security concerns about whether this was deliberately designed. Disclosed responsibly with Microsoft security teams.

---

### YellowKey - BitLocker 加密绕过漏洞

* **功能介绍**: 展示了一个严重的安全漏洞,可通过 Windows 恢复环境操作绕过 BitLocker 磁盘加密保护
* **主要特点**:
  - 仅需一个包含特定 FsTx 文件夹结构的 U 盘
  - 利用 Windows 恢复环境(WinRE)组件中的漏洞
  - 无需知道加密密钥即可获得对 BitLocker 保护卷的完全访问权限
  - 影响 Windows 11、Server 2022 和 Server 2025(Windows 10 不受影响)
* **为何值得关注**: 研究者认为这可能是一个故意留下的后门,因为存在可疑的组件行为——该漏洞组件仅存在于 WinRE 中,具有标准 Windows 安装中不存在的独特功能。该漏洞的简单性和便利性引发了对其是否为刻意设计的严重安全担忧。已通过微软安全团队负责任地披露。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Nightmare-Eclipse/YellowKey)**


## 🎬 YouTube Tech Videos / YouTube 技术视频

### 🎬 Building AlphaGo from scratch – Eric Jang
**Channel:** Dwarkesh Patel

* **What the video covers:** Eric Jang provides a detailed walkthrough of building AlphaGo from the ground up, but leveraging modern AI tools and frameworks that weren't available during DeepMind's original development.

* **Key topics discussed:** Reimplementing reinforcement learning algorithms with contemporary tooling, understanding the architecture of AlphaGo (policy networks, value networks, Monte Carlo Tree Search), and how modern infrastructure simplifies what was once a groundbreaking engineering challenge.

* **Why it's worth watching:** This is a masterclass in understanding AI systems by rebuilding them. By reconstructing AlphaGo with today's tools, you gain both historical perspective on how far AI has come and practical insight into RL systems. Perfect for engineers who learn by doing and want to demystify landmark AI achievements.

---

### 🎬 从零开始构建 AlphaGo – Eric Jang
**频道:** Dwarkesh Patel

* **视频内容概述:** Eric Jang 详细演示如何从零开始构建 AlphaGo,但使用的是现代 AI 工具和框架,而非 DeepMind 当年的原始技术栈。

* **主要话题:** 使用当代工具重新实现强化学习算法,深入理解 AlphaGo 的架构(策略网络、价值网络、蒙特卡洛树搜索),以及现代基础设施如何简化曾经具有开创性的工程挑战。

* **为何值得观看:** 这是一堂通过重建来理解 AI 系统的大师课。通过用今天的工具重构 AlphaGo,你既能获得 AI 发展的历史视角,又能获得强化学习系统的实践洞察。非常适合喜欢动手学习、想要揭开里程碑式 AI 成就神秘面纱的工程师。

**[Watch Video / 观看视频](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X_ZVSPcZhtw)**

### 🎬 Why companies still need real people responsible for critical work

**Channel:** freeCodeCamp.org

* What the video covers: Chris Coyier discusses the irreplaceable role of human accountability in business-critical operations, particularly in the context of AI tools like Claude
* Key topics discussed: The limitations of delegating critical responsibilities to AI systems, the importance of human ownership and decision-making in high-stakes work, and why automation cannot replace human accountability
* Why it's worth watching: Essential perspective for developers and tech leaders navigating the AI era—understanding where human judgment and responsibility remain non-negotiable, even as AI capabilities expand

---

### 🎬 为什么公司仍然需要真人负责关键工作

**频道:** freeCodeCamp.org

* 视频内容概述: Chris Coyier 探讨了在业务关键操作中人类责任不可替代的角色,特别是在 Claude 等 AI 工具的背景下
* 主要话题: AI 系统承担关键责任的局限性、人类在高风险工作中的所有权和决策重要性,以及为什么自动化无法取代人类问责制
* 为何值得观看: 为开发者和技术领导者提供 AI 时代的重要视角——理解即使 AI 能力不断扩展,哪些领域的人类判断和责任仍然不可或缺

### 🎬 Think in JavaScript – The Hard & Conceptual Parts (Full Course)
**Channel:** freeCodeCamp.org

* What the video covers: An engineering-grade deep dive into JavaScript's internal mechanics, focusing on the hard and conceptual aspects that separate surface-level coding from true mastery
* Key topics discussed: Core JavaScript concepts including execution context, closures, scope, asynchronous behavior, prototypal inheritance, and the event loop—the foundational mechanics that determine how code actually runs
* Why it's worth watching: Transforms you from guessing why code works to understanding the underlying principles. Essential for developers who want to move beyond trial-and-error coding and build a solid mental model of JavaScript's execution

### 🎬 深入理解 JavaScript——核心难点与概念详解（完整课程）

* 主要话题: JavaScript 核心概念，包括执行上下文、闭包、作用域、异步行为、原型继承和事件循环——这些决定代码实际运行方式的基础机制

### 🎬 Timsort - When one algorithm isn't enough #coding #maths
**Channel:** Algo Andre

* What the video covers: An exploration of Timsort, the hybrid sorting algorithm used in Python's built-in sort functions
* Key topics discussed: How Timsort combines merge sort and insertion sort strategies to achieve optimal performance on real-world data; why Python chose this algorithm over traditional sorting methods
* Why it's worth watching: Understanding Timsort reveals why practical algorithm design often requires blending multiple approaches rather than relying on a single technique—essential knowledge for writing efficient code

### 🎬 Timsort - 当一种算法还不够时 #编程 #数学
**频道:** Algo Andre

* 视频内容概述: 深入讲解 Timsort——Python 内置排序函数所使用的混合排序算法
* 主要话题: Timsort 如何结合归并排序和插入排序的策略,在真实数据上实现最优性能;Python 为何选择这个算法而非传统排序方法
* 为何值得观看: 理解 Timsort 揭示了实用算法设计往往需要融合多种方法而非依赖单一技术——这是编写高效代码的必备知识
